name: Vmind
description: Gemini-3-powered mind-map studio that asks the model to emit a JSON tree with at least 15 nodes and 3+ levels, then renders the topology with JointJS so prompts become shareable diagrams.

name: LastPush
description: Dev-first deployment cockpit that pairs site/domain/billing navigation with wallet balance, activity logs, and deploy buttons so developers ship updates without leaving the dashboard.

name: eGBA Library
description: Chrome-hosted eGBA Library exposes a lightweight EmulatorJS-based GBA emulator with a GitHub download button, localStorage-backed SRAM saves, and feature/installation/structure sections that guide you through loading ROMs and using the embedded controls.

name: NostrLink
description: Secure decentralized messaging front end built with nostr-tools; the UI lets you generate or paste a nsec key, then handle chats, polls, videos, and relay lists across Nostr event types with a minimalist dashboard.

name: xer
description: Open-source Chrome extension copilot for X (Twitter) that collects timeline posts, drafts replies, suggests interactions, and ships built-in risk control plus local privacy analysis so you stay in control.

name: Degenskills
description: Crypto venture architect workspace that runs targeted or chaos agentic prompts against Gemini models to mint wild Web3 startup ideas, verify viability, and build tokenomic/roadmap/tech blueprints with a forge UI.

name: Weixin Bot SDK
description: TypeScript SDK for building WeChat bots on top of the iLink bot HTTP API, with QR login, session persistence, polling, event handlers, and media upload or download helpers.

name: picox
description: Electron desktop control center for running multiple picox agents with guided setup, quick or full config editing, live logs, backups, and tray-based background lifecycle management.

name: SeeFactory
description: AI movie studio for turning ideas into scripts, visual storyboards, scene images, and video continuations, with dedicated modes for frame planning, clip extension, and freeform creation.

name: claw2dx
description: Chrome extension that overlays Live2D characters on X.com, exposes a popup control panel, and accepts WebSocket commands for model switching, motions, expressions, and message bubbles.

name: Solcraft
description: Solana-focused venture architect that generates dapp ideas, checks for collisions, builds tokenomics and technical blueprints, and carries projects from prompt to launch-ready token flows.

name: JustClaw
description: One-tap deployment dashboard for Clawbots with a polished web UI for bot management, runtime monitoring, secure credentials, and mock multi-chain funding flows.

name: NadLabs
description: Monad-native AI creative studio that generates launchable concepts, verifies differentiation, drafts contracts and frontend prompts, and prepares Nad.fun token launch payloads.

name: XMiner
description: Chrome extension for X and Twitter that auto-scrolls feeds, extracts visible tweets into structured JSON, filters by media type, and optionally streams new items to a webhook queue.

name: 4craft
description: BSC and four.meme oriented AI builder that takes users from idea generation to contract synthesis, frontend prompting, and token launch preparation in one pipeline.

name: ClawdPack
description: Permissioned Solana wallet for AI agents, offering encrypted local vault storage, multi-account derivation, and secure transaction signing for SOL and SPL assets.

name: mailawd
description: Minimal landing site for a Mail.tm based temporary email skill, built to present agent-friendly mailbox service access and distribute the downloadable skill definition.

name: Moltindex
description: Agent tool index platform with a React front end, Express and Mongo backend, and automated ingestion workflow that turns structured posts into searchable catalog entries.
